name: Oberbank AG
summary: Oberbank AG provides various banking products and services. The company operates through Corporate and Business Banking, Personal Banking, and Financial Markets segments. The Corporate and Business Banking segment provides corporate and business loans, investment finance, and structured finance; private equity and mezzanine capital funds; and leasing, export finance, syndicated loans and international lending, documentary business and guarantees, factoring, and payment services. The Personal Banking segment offers deposit banking, personal accounts and loans, securities services, asset management services, private banking services, and building society savings schemes, as well as card products; and life, risk, accident, and property insurance services. The Financial Markets segment is involved in equity investment and trading activities. It operates through a network of 161 branch offices, including 97 branches in Austria, 28 branches in Germany, 21 branches in the Czech Republic, 12 branches in Hungary, and 3 branches in Slovakia. Oberbank AG was founded in 1869 and is headquartered in Linz, Austria.
